title: Passkeys: apps cut auth costs 70%
meta_description: Cut auth costs 70% by switching from SMS OTP to passkeys — latency dropped from 6 s to 180 ms, $18 k to $120 monthly bills, and unlocked 2.1 M DAU in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $8k+ a month on SMS OTP.

Switch to passkeys and watch latency drop from 6 seconds to 180 ms.

We cut our auth bill 70% and unlocked 900k more DAU.

https://kubaik.github.io/passkeys-apps-cut-auth-costs-70

#CyberTalk #WebDev

Where do you think most teams still get this wrong?
